reports/experiment_program/F1/f1_scoreca.honest_framing: These 2026-01-05..2026-03-05 rows are inside the frozen TEST split (>=2022) and were ALREADY SCORED by the published headline; they were never trained/calibrated/gated on. This is a HELD-FROM-FITTING forward season, not a pristine never-scored lockbox. The pristine post-2026-06-18 lockbox is EMPTY (data ends 2026-03-05).
reports/experiment_program/F1/f1_scoreca.gate_verdict: PASS — frozen model beats the stronger baseline on the held-from-fitting 2026 season AND AP did not regress past tol AND calibration held

reports/hab/cyano/cyano_onset_claim_card.question: Does the continental cyano-onset law survive adversarial claim-card checks?
reports/hab/cyano/cyano_onset_claim_card.headline: Latitude/quadratic geography is a real cold-start cyano-onset law under held-out state, lat-band, and year tests; do not sell the weak photoperiod-only mechanism, and treat winter met as a secondary hardening path.

photoperiod_note.read: photoperiod-only is interpretive/weak; it is not the claim anchor.

current_year_censor_check_exclude_2026.read: Claim cannot depend on partial/current 2026 if this stays positive.

forecast_valid_prior_winter_met_competit.read: If winter met materially beats lat-only on held-out regions, the publishable claim is a geography+forecast-weather law, not pure latitude.

claim_card.claim: Cold-start first high/very-high CyAN bloom onset DOY is partly predictable from latitude in held-out US regions.
do_not_claim: the law predicts bloom abundance or persistence
the law is validated outside CyAN lakes or outside the US panel
claim_card.decision_value: Useful for when to start cyano sampling/remote-sensing attention at lakes with no local history.
claim_card.next_redteam: Hold out a post-2026 year and a non-US freshwater panel if one is staged.

reports/experiment_program/G2/hypoxia_on.what: Deep-basin / fjord anoxia ONSET classifier with lead-time, vs persistence.
reports/experiment_program/G2/hypoxia_on.target: ONSET: among currently-non-hypoxic origins T (bottom DO_min > 2.0 mg/L), does hypoxia (DO_min <= 2.0) BEGIN within (T, T+h]? Tokyo Bay TBEIC 7 stations.
reports/experiment_program/G2/hypoxia_on.why_onset: State-at-T+h rides base-rate hypoxia season (parent AP ~0.79). Onset is the aquaculture decision and removes the 'already hypoxic stays hypoxic' free lunch; raw persistence is structurally useless here (predicts no-onset for every origin).
reports/experiment_program/G2/hypoxia_on.gate: STRAT lift over persist+season with station-block bootstrap CI excluding 0 (lead-skill); AND best model beats the better of seasonal-naive / DO-proximity null.
reports/experiment_program/G2/hypoxia_on.read: If STRAT lift CI excludes 0 at multi-week lead AND the model beats the better naive, stratification carries deployable onset lead-skill. If lift ~0 or model<=naive, the persistence-or-seasonal ceiling extends to the onset reframe.

_meta.question: How many days ahead can we predict FIB beach exceedance with genuine skill OVER STATION MEMORY (a multi-feature memory-only HGBT), honestly? (Not over single-bit persistence — that is the weak baseline a critic caught the prior version overclaiming on.)
_meta.headline_baseline: STATION-MEMORY MODEL: HGBT with the same learner/CV/folds as the main model, trained on ONLY the memory/lab-history features (MEMORY_FEATS: exc_prev/exc_prev2/exc_roll5_prev/exc_roll10_prev/station_prior_rate/station_prior_n/days_since_prev/ent|fec|tot|ecoli_prev+_roll3_prev) — NO rain, NO environment, NO season-beyond-memory, NO geography/context.
_meta.win_criterion: HEADLINE: lead L>=1 where the full model beats the STATION-MEMORY MODEL by a CI-separated paired-AP margin (bootstrap 95% CI excludes 0) — i.e. the environmental/forecast features add real skill over the autocorrelation backbone. The single-bit persistence-at-L + climatology comparison is RETAINED but explicitly labelled the WEAK baseline; a beat over it does NOT define the horizon.
_meta.overclaim_fix: A critic caught the prior version claiming a 3-day horizon by comparing only against single-bit persistence (AP ~0.18-0.20). The honest horizon OVER the station-memory MODEL is ~1 day: real CI-separated win at L=0 (+0.16 AP) and L=1 (+0.08 AP), a TIE at L=2 (~+0.01, CI may touch 0), and a LOSS at L=3 (~-0.03). Beyond ~1 day the full model is just station memory + noise.
_meta.leakage_discipline: lab/memory features use reveal_lag_days=L (predecessor sample date <= t-L); rainfall windows END at t-L (lagged rain, no numerical weather forecast available locally -> antecedent-rain proxy is a CONSERVATIVE lower bound, never leaks; a real precip forecast could only do better). climatology fit on train only. NO same-day or future leakage.
_meta.label: enterococcus
caveats: No local numerical weather forecast: forecast uses LAGGED/antecedent rain (windows end at t-L). This is the honest no-forecast lower bound; a skillful precip forecast at 1-3d could recover some of the lost rain signal.

Under ~weekly beach sampling the lab predecessor is typically already >=7d stale, so persistence-at-L barely changes with L -> the BAR (persistence) is nearly as strong at L=3 as at L=0. Beating it is what would prove forecast skill.
EXCLUDE_SAN_DIEGO is the honest headline; ALL is reported but inflated by the San Diego/Tijuana 2022 regime break.
Margins use the RAW-ranking model AP (isotonic is monotone -> same ranking). Calibrated AP is reported alongside for deploy-readiness.

forecast_horizon.verdict: HONEST: forecast skill OVER STATION MEMORY = 2 day(s). Environmental/forecast features add CI-separated skill at L=0 and out to lead 2d over the multi-feature station-memory MODEL; beyond that the full model is just station memory + noise (TIE/LOSS). Per-lead margin over the station-memory MODEL: L=0 +0.159 [0.1487,0.1683] WIN; L=1 +0.076 [0.0676,0.084] WIN; L=2 +0.016 [0.0081,0.0233] WIN; L=3 -0.018 [-0.025,-0.0103] LOSS. (The model still trivially beats single-bit persistence-at-L + climatology out to lead 3d, but that is the WEAK baseline — NOT the headline; do NOT claim a 3-day horizon from it.)

robustness.detection_conditional_note: headline is among DETECTABLE samples (the bloom regime). On the full population incl. non-detects the rank stat dilutes -- expected zero-inflation (no bloom -> no toxin -> no toxic genes), not a refutation.

reports/hab/cyano/mcye_alberta.json.verdict: DEFINITIVE REPLICATION at scale: toxic-genotype (mcyE) -> microcystin beyond biomass holds across 55 lakes and 5 years (rho 0.6824, perm-p 0.0), every lake and every year positive, in the detectable/bloom regime. The single-season Erie finding is now a large-n, multi-lake, multi-year established effect.

reports/bacteria/decision_rule.json.what: deployable advisory decision rule for the bacteria nowcast (decision-curve + per-beach table)
reports/bacteria/decision_rule.json.model: frozen bacteria_hgbt_isotonic (retrospective out-of-time stable; prospective lockbox pending; reports/bacteria/prospective_backtest.json)

deployable_rule.rule: issue a beach advisory when calibrated P(enterococcus exceedance) >= 0.0635
deployable_rule.chosen_on: 2020-21 validation (recall>=0.80), via operating_point_analysis.py — NOT re-tuned on test
deployable_rule.reading: catches 86% of true exceedances; issues 3.35 false advisories per caught exceedance (precision 23%); flags 38% of beach-days.

decision_curve.method: Vickers-Elkin net benefit; valid because the model is calibrated on the retrospective out-of-time proxy (ECE<0.05); prospective lockbox pending
decision_curve.interpretation: across this threshold-probability range the calibrated model beats both 'advise everywhere' and 'advise nowhere'; p_t is the policy's implied cost (one caught exceedance worth (1-p_t)/p_t false advisories).

reports/bacteria/decision_rule.json.honest_cost_note: No fabricated dollar/illness counts. The trade-off is stated in operational units (exceedances caught vs false advisories) + the DCA-implied cost ratio. A site that wants fewer closures raises tau (toward the max-precision point); a site prioritising public health lowers it (toward max-detection). EPA recreational-water practice errs toward warning, i.e. a LOW tau, which this rule reflects.

reports/experiment_program/B1/b1_results.title: Russian River advection replication (driver-null escape test)
reports/experiment_program/B1/b1_results.headline: ESCAPE REPLICATED on Russian River: upstream turbidity (Hopland 11462500) as a lead feature adds dAP=0.049 (CI 0.035..0.066) over the downstream-persistence baseline at the 2-day horizon -- CI fully above +0.03. Upstream-ALONE does not beat persistence (it is marginal-over-persistence). At lead=1d the lift is only +0.025 (persistence acf=0.939 too strong); the escape opens once downstream memory decays. Klamath upstream->downstream advection win generalizes to a Sonoma Water intake basin.

permutation_null.method: block-shuffle upstream features by water-year, 200 iters, lead=2d, LOBO OOF
permutation_null.interpretation: advective lift collapses under block shuffle -> not an autocorrelation artifact

confound_control_vs_culture_history.note: Baseline is the FULL culture-memory (30d+6wk geomean + same-day sub-threshold culture + season). ddPCR is real early-warning only if it adds AUC over THIS with a CI excluding 0 AND the within-tertile lift holds; else it's persistence.

reports/bacteria/ddpcr_real_vs_artifact..scope: San Diego only (91 stations); culture-SAFE station-days with a same-day ddPCR call
reports/bacteria/ddpcr_real_vs_artifact..verdict: raw forward lift PRESENT (ddPCR+ 0.282 vs ddPCR- 0.07, base 0.195, delta CI [0.0842, 0.2795]); after controlling for the FULL culture-memory baseline, ddPCR does NOT add (CI incl 0) (OOF AUC full-history 0.7411 -> +ddPCR 0.7558, +0.0147, CI [-0.0377, 0.0697]). => the raw lift is mostly PERSISTENCE (ddPCR fires at chronically-dirtier stations that exceed more anyway); ddPCR adds little beyond culture history. Not a clean early-warning win.

_headline.note: The pooled numbers below are NOT the primary headline. Pooled all-county AP/ROC-AUC are dominated by San Diego (large volume, ~60% base rate, AP~0.96) and overstate generalization. The honest operational headline is the leave-one-county-out result in reproduce/expected/spatial_holdout.json.

reports/model_lab/champion_claimcard_B.j.purpose: settle the held champion re-freeze on the operational metric (decision-curve net benefit + clustered-bootstrap margin), not pooled AP

claim_card.claim: CatBoost champion upgrade over frozen HGBT (deployable stratum, full drivers)
reasons: passes margin + clustered-bootstrap CI + null/FDR/LOCO + decision-curve

reports/model_lab/champion_claimcard_B.j.decision: RECORD-DON'T-SHIP (operationally) — the AP margin is real and county-robust (clustered CI [0.0041, 0.0193] excludes 0), but at the advisory threshold the net-benefit gain is NEGLIGIBLE (max |delta| 0.00138 < 0.002). The ranking edge is concentrated in the dry/summer slices but does not translate into deployment value, so a frozen-champion swap + new dependency is not justified on operational grounds. The honest case to ship rests on calibration (ECE) + the dry/summer-slice gain, not net benefit.

reports/interlingua_eu_transfer.json.hypothesis: The audited physics-pi screen that ranks coastal-FIB marine exceedance above weak controls across CA/IE/FL/AU_NSW/HI is tested on a NEW CONTINENT'S coasts (pan-EU bathing water) as a hardening/boundary check.
reports/interlingua_eu_transfer.json.held_out_scheme: leave-COUNTRY-out (Part A: train US donor, zero-shot rank each held-out EU country) + leave-SITE-out resolution control (Part B: screen-positive FL donor, daily vs EEA-style annual class). NEVER random rows.
reports/interlingua_eu_transfer.json.label: Part A: EU Bathing Water Directive annual class binarized (Poor|Sufficient='bad'). Part B/donor: marine enterococcus exceedance ent>104 cfu/100ml (US-EPA marine BAV).
reports/interlingua_eu_transfer.json.baselines: calendar-only (interlingua signature control) AND site-memory (per-site/LOYO historical bad-rate). Gates: permutation-null p + bootstrap 95% CI on lift.
reports/interlingua_eu_transfer.json.data_resolution_caveat: EEA is ANNUAL-CLASS only: one row per (site, year), categorical qualityStatus, and a CONSTANT July-1 PLACEHOLDER date (no per-sample FIB, no sample date). The daily pi transfer is a PER-EVENT DAILY test; with a placeholder date the EU pi is a per-site July CLIMATOLOGY (a geography proxy), NOT a per-event physics signal. Part B quantifies how much skill this coarsening alone destroys on a screen-positive donor, to separate a RESOLUTION boundary from a GEOGRAPHIC one.
reports/interlingua_eu_transfer.json.verdict_reason: the donor's pi SURVIVES annual coarsening (so resolution is not the blocker) yet pi does NOT out-rank calendar+memory on held-out EU coasts — a genuine geographic boundary for this annual EU bathing-water panel.
reports/interlingua_eu_transfer.json.what_would_refute_it: ESCAPE would be refuted by a perm-p>=0.05 or a bootstrap lift CI including 1.0 on the 'escaping' EU countries, or by the calendar control matching pi (=> seasonality not physics). DATA-RESOLUTION-LIMITED would be refuted by the donor's pi SURVIVING annual coarsening (Part B annual pi still beats calendar+memory) — which would re-open a true EU geographic test. A BOUNDARY verdict would be refuted by acquiring a PER-SAMPLE EU FIB source (e.g. France baignades daily counts) and showing daily-resolution EU pi transfer.

verdict.lightgbm: REAL BOOST — dAP>=gate, paired CI excludes 0, county majority
verdict.catboost: REAL BOOST — dAP>=gate, paired CI excludes 0, county majority

**6) SO WHAT:** The 40 new sources are usable from lakehouse silver without expanding them into a generic billion-row derivative table. Downstream work can now select specific source-native datasets and normalize only the ones that pass a model/value gate.

Value gate: DO_NOW for source-native promotion because it is additive, reversible/hardlink-backed, tested, and directly answers the user-requested availability question.

Critic decision: promote source-native only. Do not generic-normalize the 40 swarm20 sources yet; the preview estimated 1,158,259,346 normalized rows and flagged metadata/timestamp wide-column risk on all 40.

reports/hab/erie/ERIE_CYANO_DRIVER_BREAK.text:
# Western Lake Erie microcystin — does nutrient LOADING break the cyano driver-null?

**Two-Claude campaign, 2026-06-19. Verdict: NO. The cyano driver-null HOLDS — now tested
with the two levers the satellite work could never reach: real TOXIN labels and gold-standard
tributary nutrient LOADING flux.**

## Why this was the genuinely-open question
The national CyAN-satellite cyano work ([[algae-bloom-frontier]]) found bloom *occurrence* is
governed by satellite-CI autocorrelation + seasonal climatology, with no dynamic weather or
nutrient driver lifting skill once season + lake-climate were controlled. But CyAN cannot see
**microcystin toxin**, and no national feed carries **tributary nutrient loading**. The memory
named exactly these as the only untested levers for a real cyano breakthrough. Western Lake
Erie is the one system where both exist on disk:

- **GLERL/NOAA western-basin field sampling** (`glerl_lake_erie_hab_wq`): in-situ
  **particulate microcystin** + chlorophyll + phycocyanin + lake TP/SRP/N at the WE2–WE16
  transect, 2012–2019 (641 toxin obs; the 2020–2022 file layout drops station id).
- **Heidelberg Tributary Loading Program** (`heidelberg_htlp`): **Maumee River** near-daily
  flow + TP + SRP, ~500 samples/yr — the exact data NOAA's seasonal bloom-severity forecast
  is built on.

Western Lake Erie *Microcystis* is the textbook nutrient-driven HAB. If the driver-null was
going to break anywhere, it was here.

## What we tested (3 independent lanes)

**Lane A — loading FORECAST gate** (`research/hab/erie_microcystin_driver_gate.py`).
Target = next-visit particulate microcystin > 1.6 µg/L (Ohio/WHO advisory) at a WE station,
chained within-season (gap ≤ 24 d). Baseline = rich history + season + station (lagged
microcystin/chl/phyco, day-of-year, station). Driver = 22 antecedent **Maumee loading**
features (integrated TP & SRP load, flow, flow-weighted conc over 7/14/28/56 d + spring
cumulative). Eval = leave-one-YEAR-out AP (blooms cluster by year). Gates = ΔAP ≥ 0.005 +
perm-null + noise-column floor.

> Result: **ΔAP = −0.028** (loading *hurts*), perm-p **0.92**, noise-floor q95 **+0.033**,
> baseline AP 0.629 → +loading 0.601. 554 pairs, 10 stations, 8 years. **NULL.**

**Lane B — in-situ nutrient + NOAA replication** (`research/hab/erie_insitu_nutrient_gate.py`,
claude-f). Contemporaneous lake nutrients vs microcystin, de-seasoned + within-station:
only **lake TP** keeps a partial association (rho 0.225, perm-p 2e-4) — and that is bloom
**co-product** co-variation (cells contain P), not a forecast driver. SRP, N, TP:N all wash.
Year-level NOAA spring-load→severity (n=8): directionally consistent for **chlorophyll**
(rho 0.74, p=0.04) but **not** for the toxin (microcystin-median rho 0.52, p=0.19).

**Critic — adversarial refutation** (claude-critic, independent from-raw reimplementation).
Attacked the null 5 ways: weaker/seasononly baselines (loading lift negative at every level);
WHO >8 µg/L target (−0.053); chlorophyll target (−0.030, perm-p 0.96); phycocyanin (+0.011,
perm-p 0.12 fails); the canonical NOAA spring→Aug–Sep framing (+0.015 AP but **year-perm-p
0.156**, collapses at n=8); load math + power. **NULL SURVIVES every attack.**

**Lane C — buoyancy mechanism (calm + warm)** (`research/hab/erie_strat_met_gate.py`).
The remaining in-lake lever: *Microcystis* floats into surface scum in sustained calm, warm
water. GLERL casts are surface-only (no true stratification), so we tested the proxy —
in-situ physical state (lagged) + antecedent NASA POWER met (calm-fraction, longest calm run,
warmth+anomaly, solar, precip over 3/7/14 d at the WE centroid). The automated gate initially
flagged a "pass," but **decomposition killed it as a false positive** (`erie_strat_met_decomp.json`):
the actual calm/warm **met washes** (ΔAP −0.017, perm-p 0.75); the lone passing arm (6 in-situ
features, +0.032) does not localize — optical bloom-proxies (Secchi/turbidity/DO) are null, the
physical group sits *exactly* on its noise floor (+0.023 vs floor +0.023), and **no single feature
clears its own noise floor**. It was small-n multi-feature HGBT noise inflation that luck-passed
1 of 3 arm perm-nulls — the Alexandrium +0.04-noise-floor trap again. **Buoyancy lever: NULL.**

## The honest scientific conclusion
1. **Loading sets the seasonal/annual ENVELOPE, not the sub-seasonal forecast.** Spring P load
   tracks that year's *chlorophyll* (biomass) — consistent with the published Lake Erie
   relationship — but provides **no station-level forecast skill** for microcystin occurrence
   once season + autocorrelation are controlled. Minimum detectable ΔAP at this N is ~0.02–0.03;
   every observed loading effect is ≤ 0.
2. **Toxin ≠ biomass.** Loading relates to biomass (chl rho 0.74) far better than to the toxin
   (mc rho 0.52, n.s.). Microcystin is governed by strain/regulation dynamics loading can't see.
3. **The cyano driver-null now generalizes to the hardest possible test** — real toxin labels +
   gold-standard tributary loading in the most nutrient-driven freshwater HAB on Earth. This
   closes the two levers [[algae-bloom-frontier]] left open. It is a definitive **negative**,
   not a manufactured breakthrough.

## National generalization (the properly-powered test)
Erie is one system (n=554 pairs, 8 years) — and Lane C showed n=554 has a +0.03 AP noise
floor that can fake a "pass." So we built the **first national in-situ microcystin toxin
corpus** to test the driver-null with real power:

- `data/external_raw/wqp_microcystin/` — 68,924 WQP grab-sample microcystin measurements,
  5,905 sites, 2008–2024 (`ops/data_fetch/fetch_wqp_microcystin.py`). Censoring handled
  (non-detects "<0.13"/"ND"/"U" → below-threshold, not dropped — they're 18% of data).
- `data/external_curated/wqp_microcystin_panel/panel.parquet` — 32,812-visit panel, 3,564
  sites, **49 states** (`research/hab/build_national_microcystin_panel.py`).
- `data/external_raw/wqp_microcystin_met/` — per-site NASA POWER daily met, 432 well-sampled
  sites (`ops/data_fetch/fetch_nasapower_microcystin_sites.py`).

**National forecastability** (new result): in-situ **toxin** blooms forecast at pooled LOYO AP
**0.774** (vs persistence ~0.56) from history+season+site alone — the CyAN *satellite* finding
([[algae-bloom-frontier]]) now confirmed on the real toxin, 49 states. NOTE (critic-2 caveat):
the pooled AP is optimistic vs the **macro within-site AP ~0.57** (mean within-site base rate
0.285) — cross-site ranking inflates the pooled number; the honest per-lake forecast skill is
the within-site lift (+0.28, 96.6% of sites beat their own base rate). CENSORING FIX (critic-2):
the panel builder originally dropped ~13.8k non-detects with a blank result-unit; recovering
them via the detection-limit fields lowered the base rate 0.194→0.141 and the headline ~0.80→0.78.

**National driver test** (`research/hab/national_microcystin_driver_gate.py`): adding 18
antecedent met features (calm-fraction, warmth+anomaly, solar, precip, wind over 7/14/30 d)
to that baseline, evaluated under BOTH leave-year-out and grouped leave-site-out:

> Result (corrected censoring-fixed panel): ΔAP **−0.007** (leave-year-out) and **−0.0024**
> (leave-site-out) — both below the +0.005 gate. **Noise floor is NEGATIVE** at n~21k — random
> features cannot manufacture lift here, unlike Erie's n=554. **NULL, robustly.** Met hurts even
> vs a season-only baseline; met-alone AP (0.335) ≈ the base rate. Zero forecast skill nationally.

This is the decisive generalization: the cyano driver-null holds for the real toxin, at
national scale (431 lakes / 49 states), against meteorology — and the negative noise floor
proves the result is power-real, not an artifact. It also explains Erie's Lane C false
positive (small-n inflated floor).

## What WOULD still be worth trying (kept, not done)
- **In-lake stratification / water-column temperature** at the station (vertical structure
  drives *Microcystis* buoyancy) — a different mechanism than upstream loading.
- **Strain / qPCR mcyE toxin-gene** labels — the toxin-regulation lever, genuinely unseen here.
- n is the wall on the seasonal relationship: more bloom-years (recover 2020–2022 station ids;
  add other GLERL/IFCB basins) would let the spring-load→severity relation be properly null-tested.

## Reproduce
```
python research/hab/erie_microcystin_driver_gate.py     # Lane A  -> erie_microcystin_driver_gate.json
python research/hab/erie_insitu_nutrient_gate.py        # Lane B  -> erie_insitu_nutrient_gate.json
# critic probes: reports/hab/erie/_critic_probe.py, _critic_springgate.py
```
Coordination + ledger + learnings: `reports/hab/erie/{COORDINATION,erie_intents.json,erie_learnings.jsonl}`.

reports/bacteria/breakthrough_gate/break.claim: Early-warning marine enterococcus exceedance forecasting on currently-clean beaches.
reports/bacteria/breakthrough_gate/break.final_breakthrough_reason: FROZEN_HEADLINE.json scored_forward=true after reports/bacteria/prospective_scorecard.json scored HOLDS on 198 post-freeze rows / 8 events. Commercially claimable as an initial prospective shadow-pilot hold; not a production advisory replacement.

lockbox.rule: Samples with sample_date STRICTLY AFTER freeze_cutoff are the prospective lockbox. They must never be used for training, calibration, or signal gating. The headline is scored on them, untouched, by research/bacteria/prospective_scorecard.py.

checks.threshold: frozen=true and model AP equals FROZEN_HEADLINE headline AP
checks.why: Guards against pooled or stale headline artifacts.
The deployable stratum must clear an absolute precision-recall bar.
The model must beat the strongest operational comparator, not just a weak baseline.
A deployable warning claim must remain calibrated.
The onset slice must be tied to the same sealed headline run.
The core science claim is clean-to-dirty early warning over station memory.
The onset lift should be large enough to survive ordinary metric noise.
The result must travel across counties against the rain-rule incumbent.
The result must travel across counties against station memory.
Calibration must be deployable in most county holdouts.

checks.threshold: status=scored, verdict=HOLDS, AP within frozen tolerance, ECE <= 0.05
checks.why: Converts the frozen retrospective headline into initial forward evidence without retraining or retuning.

no_bloat_policy: Use only sealed, hashable inputs for the headline: beach observations, rainfall, discharge, harmonic tide, and station geometry.
Keep the headline fixed to label=enterococcus, reveal_lag_days=2, EXCLUDE_SAN_DIEGO, train<=2019, calibrate=2020-2021, test>=2022.
Treat OOI, satellite, HRRR, ERA5, new hydrology, and discovery inventories as add-on candidate tracks until separately pre-registered.
Do not use live fetches, foundation-model bakeoffs, San Diego pooled gains, or weak-baseline comparisons to justify the breakthrough claim.
The final claim requires post-freeze lockbox scoring with no retraining, threshold tuning, calibration updates, or signal gating.
reports/bacteria/breakthrough_gate/break.blocking_next_step: Accrue a larger prospective pilot event count and produce a full pilot readout with thresholds, confusion matrices, calibration curves, and baseline comparisons before claiming production-scale validation.

reports/predict10x/sog_central_onset.jso.what: Pre-registered 2nd-basin hypoxia-RELIEF ONSET test at SoG-central (ONC ~300 m). Distinct from the already-washed density-TRANSFER test (sog_renewal_transfer.py).

primary_definition.note: thresholds LOCKED to the estate hypoxia line BEFORE viewing any model lift; grid below is transparency only, NOT used to pick the primary.

reports/predict10x/sog_central_onset.jso.read: Only 4 pre-registered relief-onset events at SoG-central under the locked hypoxia-line definition (< 8). The pre-registered HARD GATE fires: do NOT fit a model. SoG-central is hypoxia-prone but does not produce enough discrete deep-DO relief-onset events to power a carrier-lead test. Consistent with the prior density-transfer WASH and the lab base rate. A clean auto-reject, not a failure.

reports/experiment_program/H1/claims_ind.artifact: Monterey Bay AI Lab — Trust-Layer Claims Index (H1)
reports/experiment_program/H1/claims_ind.purpose: External-facing, auditable index of every promoted claim and every logged null, joined from the signal ledger, the experiment-program gate ledger, and the frozen headline. Read-only join; invents no metric; each row carries its evidence path.

verdict_vocabulary.PRIMARY: This signal IS (the core of) the validated model for that target.
verdict_vocabulary.KEEP: Passed the promotion gate as a feature (temporal dAP >= 0.005 AND survives leave-one-beach-out).
verdict_vocabulary.WASH: Tested as a feature; no transferable lift (|dAP| < 0.005 or sign-flips across strata). A logged null.
verdict_vocabulary.REJECT: Tested; regressed the target (dAP < -0.005). A logged negative.
verdict_vocabulary.UNTESTED: Plausible but NOT yet gated for that target. No claim is made.
verdict_vocabulary.CONFIRMED: (interactions) A real interaction effect, but below the operational lift bar.
verdict_vocabulary.REDUNDANT: Subsumed by a signal already in the model.

availability_disclosure.note: The frozen AP is scored with a 2-day fixed reveal-lag proxy, not the true per-sample available_at timestamp (measured p90 ~11-15d). Under true availability the AP is conservatively ~0.02 lower. This field discloses the delta so the headline is not read as available_at-clean.

lockbox.rule: Samples with sample_date STRICTLY AFTER freeze_cutoff are the prospective lockbox. They must never be used for training, calibration, or signal gating. The headline is scored on them, untouched, by research/bacteria/prospective_scorecard.py.

target_headlines.question: Will a beach's water exceed the AB411 enterococcus standard (>104 MPN/100mL)?
target_headlines.headline: EXCLUDE_SAN_DIEGO calibrated AP 0.5099 / ROC-AUC 0.868 / ECE 0.009 on 2022+ held-out data; FIRST PROSPECTIVE LOCKBOX HOLDS after 2026-06-18 freeze: AP 0.5183 / ROC-AUC 0.975 / ECE 0.034 on 198 post-freeze station-days / 8 events, no retraining or retuning. San Diego remains excluded; production-scale validation still needs a larger pilot readout.

target_headlines.question: Will a pier's next sample exceed particulate domoic acid 500 ng/L (=0.5 ng/mL)?
target_headlines.headline: SUGGESTIVE, NOT ESTABLISHED (eval_standard ClaimCard 2026-06-19, reports/_eval_cards/da_card.json): AP 0.203 (drifted down from 0.232) / ROC-AUC 0.842 time-holdout; the STRONGEST baseline is PERSISTENCE (AP 0.138), not seasonal-naive, margin +0.065; perm-null p=0.005 (ranking is real) and jackknife-stable, BUT the station-clustered bootstrap CI crosses zero at the median (only 27% of seeds clear 0, 0% clear +0.005) and LOSO is 5/8 -> directionally real yet underpowered. 'beats seasonal-naive 8/8' is the easy comparison. The 'beats C-HARM 8/8 ~10x' framing is a BROKEN-BASELINE MIRAGE (C-HARM sub-random, ROC-AUC 0.30); see reports/hab/charm_comparison.json.

target_headlines.question: Does a label-free representation rank enterococcus exceedance ZERO-SHOT in a country with no local training labels?
target_headlines.headline: zero-shot US<->IE mean AP 0.136; CORRECTED mean lift 1.91× vs matched-prevalence permutation null (NOT 2.25× vs base; inflation 1.18×); US->IE durable (p 0.020), IE->US marginal (p 0.039); beats the learned encoders + model zoo
target_headlines.baseline_to_beat: target-country base rate + within-stratum permutation null; raw-π is the champion to beat
target_headlines.coverage: CA + Ireland marine sites, weather-only physics, 1990-2026

target_headlines.question: Will bottom water go hypoxic (DO_min <= 2 mg/L) 7-14 days ahead?
target_headlines.headline: the driver-null's first clean ESCAPE — STRAT lift +0.021 AP @7-14d over persist+season. HARDENED 2026-06-19 (eval_standard ClaimCard, reports/_eval_cards/hypoxia_card.json): survives a permutation null (p=0.005) AND BH-FDR across all 5 horizons (h7 q=0.0083, h14 q=0.0083 SURVIVE; 21d +0.006 and 28d +0.003 correctly WASH) AND a station-clustered bootstrap CI [0.011, 0.053]; decision-curve valuable across the whole cost grid; strongest in the currently-oxic-origin onset slice (+0.029 = genuine lead-skill). Scope is 7-14d (not 7d+). Carrier = thermal cap + warmth, NOT haline/wind/chl; deep nets (Transformer/GRU) do not beat the tree
target_headlines.baseline_to_beat: raw persistence + seasonal climatology + persist+season HGBT (station-block bootstrap CI on the lift)
target_headlines.coverage: Tokyo Bay TBEIC, 7 stations, 2009-2026; ~6,166 hypoxia days (28-30% base rate); 4 of 7 stations have test-era events, so the station-block CI is effectively driven by 4 (lift still +ve in all 4)

target_headlines.question: Among currently-NON-hypoxic deep-basin origins (bottom DO_min > 2 mg/L), will hypoxia BEGIN within (T, T+h]? (G2 aquaculture-wedge reframe of hypoxia_lead.)
target_headlines.headline: ONSET reframe WEAKENS the hypoxia_lead escape: STRAT lift is CI-separated ONLY at h=3d (+0.0545 AP, station-block CI [0.014,0.084]) and washes (CI includes 0) at every multi-week lead 7-28d in the TEMPORAL holdout. The two holdouts DISAGREE — leave-station-out shows ~0 lift at h=3 but +0.028 at h=7 — so NO single horizon survives BOTH holdouts CI-separated. Verdict: WASH at deployable multi-week lead. The model still beats the better naive at every h (seasonality + DO-proximity), but the *stratification driver* adds no robust onset lead-skill beyond persist+season. The parent state-target '+0.02 @7-14d' does not transfer to the harder onset decision.
target_headlines.baseline_to_beat: seasonal-naive (month onset-rate climatology) + DO-proximity null + persist+season HGBT; station-block bootstrap CI on the STRAT lift, plus leave-station-out as a 2nd holdout
target_headlines.coverage: Tokyo Bay TBEIC, 7 stations, 2009-2026; onset base rate 0.14 (h=3) -> 0.36 (h=28); 601-1568 test-era onset events per horizon (none small-N); single basin

target_headlines.question: Do prior-period ocean drivers predict CA cetacean mortality (iNat proxy) beyond seasonal climatology?
target_headlines.headline: prey-collapse pathway corroborated by TWO forage indices (krill RR 0.83, rockfish RR 0.79, both cluster-significant) but SUGGESTIVE not robust (fail the 17-year-cluster bootstrap); acute-DA panel link NOT ROBUST; the DA->death link rests on case-level necropsy, not panel inference
target_headlines.best_model: effort-offset Poisson GLM (research/whale/mortality_model.py); NO panel link survives small-cluster-robust inference
target_headlines.baseline_to_beat: effort-aware per-(region,taxon,calendar-month) seasonal climatology; pairs year-block bootstrap CI must exclude 1.0
target_headlines.coverage: CA 3 coast regions, monthly 2010-2026; 675 death-months, ~17 year-clusters (iNaturalist citizen-science proxy)

target_headlines.question: Among days a fjord deep-basin is anoxic, will an episodic dense-water RENEWAL re-oxygenate it (DO_min > 2 mg/L) within ~3 weeks?
target_headlines.headline: the slow-driver principle PARTIALLY transfers to a 2nd basin once carrier+objective match the physics: deep-water density gives +0.08 AP renewal-onset lead-skill that is YEAR-ROBUST only at ~21-day lead (positive in all 4 test years); shorter 7-14d leads are fragile (carried by 2024-25, hurt in 2019-20). DENSITY >> THERMAL. Single-inlet, discovery-grade
target_headlines.best_model: season + recent-DO context + deep-water density HGBT (research/predict10x/saanich_renewal_onset.py)
target_headlines.baseline_to_beat: season + recent-DO trajectory (30-day moving-block bootstrap CI + per-test-year sign-consistency)
target_headlines.coverage: Saanich Inlet ONC deep basin (73-94 m); train 2012-2017 (SPARSE, 2014/15 absent), test 2018-2025 with a 2022-23 gap, renewal flips concentrated in 2024-25; single location, ~20 episodes / ~4 effective years

target_headlines.question: Will SF Bay see an extreme still-water-level day (daily-max total water level >= 99th pct, 2.248 m MLLW) -- the coastal-flood trigger; and is it COMPOUND (co-occurring with rain/river wetness)?
target_headlines.headline: DRIVER-LIFT CEILING (WASH): the free harmonic TIDE TABLE alone is the best naive (AP 0.223 / AUROC 0.945); full driver model AP 0.294 / AUROC 0.965 but the +0.069 AP over tide-only is NOT CI-separated (paired-bootstrap [-0.070,+0.206], N=62 OOF events). Perm-null clean (p 0.005) but signal is mostly the deterministic tide (drop-tide AP 0.201). ROBUST positive is STRUCTURAL: ~50% of extreme-water-level days are COMPOUND (surge+rain/river co-occur) -> correlated-risk wedge for insurer reserving, not driver-lift. Driver-null law holds for a new hazard/basin.
target_headlines.best_model: isotonic HGBT on harmonic-tide + surge + rain + river + memory (reports/experiment_program/G1/model_g1.py)
target_headlines.baseline_to_beat: BETTER of persistence, month-seasonal-naive, and the harmonic tide table (the tide table dominates)
target_headlines.coverage: NOAA CO-OPS 9414290 (SF Embarcadero) + gridMET (37.5,-122.5) + USGS SF-Bay-watershed discharge; daily 2005-2026, 7801 days, 79 high-water / 40 compound days (small-N)

experiment_claims.note: 2/3 headlines clean-clone reproducible. Bacteria byte-exact (AP0.4992). DA caveat (evidence json untracked). Interlingua FAIL: 20.6MB gitignored inputs, not bit-reproducible.
Zero unexplained drift. 3 real doc fixes: DA AP 0.232->0.203, AUROC 0.831->0.842; bacteria ECE 0.020->0.017.
Forward holdout LOCKED: 2487 rows, 463 events, base rate 0.186, sha256-pinned. Post-2026-03-05 lockbox empty (needs data for F1).
Interlingua headline reproduces number-for-number (meanAP 0.1357, lift 2.25x) on cached panel; ties to D1 repro gap.
2.25x was inflated. Honest lift 1.91x vs matched-prevalence null. US->IE durable (p=0.020, beats null max); IE->US marginal (p=0.039).
Cross-country gate G1-G6 defined. Re-rated to KEEP (not PRIMARY) w/ honest 1.91x payload; mechanical PRIMARY upgrade path set.
HPO harness built+tested. GPU mutex/VRAM-preflight/wake-lock engage; idempotent resume works; reusable by E1-E3. Optuna 4.6.
9 claims audited: 5 CONFIRMED, 1 weak (IE transfer CIs overlap), 1 DOWNGRADE (DA '10x over C-HARM' = broken-baseline mirage; honest ~1.4x vs persistence, CI crosses 0), 2 UNVERIFIED.
Bacteria repro kit byte-identical (sha256 match), MANIFEST verifies 9/9. DA kit = spec only. Interlingua non-kit-able.
Unified master panel: byte-reproducible (sha 02878b74), leakage-guard 5/5, 447k rows, 2 hazards; deployable slice reconciles byte-exact w/ frozen.
Unified GBT: bacteria PASS (AP 0.753, +0.045 vs single, +0.054 vs naive); DA FAIL (0.162 vs single 0.188, -0.026 negative transfer/dilution).
Shared neural trunk (GPU) matches/beats A2 GBT: bacteria 0.793, DA 0.175; no CUDA crash. Still < Chronos floor 0.827.
Zero-shot Chronos-Bolt floor: bacteria AP 0.827, beats persistence +0.080 (perm-null p=0.005, 13/16 counties). Best learner; beats A2/A3.
NO CROSS-HAZARD TRANSFER: dAP +0.018 bacteria (below +0.03 gate), -0.007 DA (noise). 'Unified' = deployment convenience, NOT scientific skill.
HONEST NULL: shared SSL latent does not beat per-hazard raw-feature baseline (no CI separation either hazard).
All-data ablation: skill NOT monotone; saturates after first memory family, all-data endpoint degrades below early peak. Both clear stronger-naive from rung 1.

FORWARD TEST PASS: frozen model AP 0.6335/AUROC 0.848 on unseen 2026 holdout (n=2487, base 0.186); beats station-memory 0.368 by +0.265. CAVEAT: temporal holdout, not yet prospective (pristine lockbox empty); AP not comparable to frozen (base-rate confound), AUROC held.

DRIVER-NULL ESCAPE REPLICATED: Russian R. upstream turbidity (Hopland) -> Guerneville intake, lead-2 dAP +0.049 (block-CI [0.035,0.066], perm-null p<0.005). 2nd advection escape after Klamath. Water-utility product.
Regime-conditional drivers FAIL strict block-CI: storm regime grazes bar (+0.0254, block-CI [-0.0005,0.0517] incl 0); heatwave NEGATIVE. DA blocked-thin. Near-miss, not separated.

TAIL-ONLY driver skill PASS: wet/storm tail driver-aug AP +0.060 (CI [0.048,0.072], perm-null p<0.005), recall@p70 +0.14. Driver-null HOLDS on mean/dry-onset/memory-tail/DA. Drivers help only on wet extremes.

Interlingua transfer SUPRA-SEASONAL both dirs but STATION-MEMORY-BOUND: US->IE ties site-memory (+0.030, CI incl 0); IE->US beats by thin +0.022 (CI excl 0). Critique reproduces (pi_minus_uv > all5). Re-rate KEEP-weak.
Expanded pi-library NULL: no new group (Richardson/Stokes/residence-time) beats UV-only bar 0.1446. Confirms pi-groups redundant/saturated.

Upstream-lead sweep: screened ~2386 pairs, found 1 NEW advective escape of 23 (Cache Slough 11455350->11455335, dAP +0.108 lead-1, CI [0.059,0.140], perm-null p<0.005); B1 control reproduced. Driver-null HOLDS for 22/23 -> advection escapes are RARE/special-case, not general. New escape caveated (possible tidal-phase artifact).

3rd/4th basin transfer GATE PASS (3/3): pi-groups LOBO-transfer CI-separated vs seasonal-naive + block null in AU-NSW (AP 0.117, 1.84x), IE (0.052, 1.60x), US-CA (0.191, 2.26x). Universality holds vs SEASONAL baselines; Cpi-audit's station-memory-bound caveat still applies (not re-tested here).

SF Bay compound flooding: driver-lift WASH (best naive = free harmonic tide table AP 0.223; model +0.069 NOT CI-sep, [-0.07,0.21]). STRUCTURAL positive: ~50% of extreme-water-level days are compound. Driver-null holds for new hazard.

Deep-basin anoxia ONSET: stratification lift CI-sep only at h=3d (+0.055), washes h=7-28d; temporal & leave-station-out holdouts disagree. Parent '+0.02 @7-14d' escape does NOT transfer to onset target.
MHW onset CEILING_NO_LIFT: not forecastable beyond persistence/seasonal at 5-30d from local SST. Confirmed MUR(24y)+Hopkins(107y); all 8 cells wash. Honest negative.
Red-tide/chl bloom spikes: CEILING both targets. chl pooled +0.064 but only 1/7 stations positive (pooled artifact); dino -0.001. Raw additive drivers closed (5th+ driver-null).

Vessel-strike KEEP-WEAK: static AIS shipping density ranks collision-vs-other cause AUC 0.746 (CI [0.658,0.823], perm p=0.0002), beats latitude prior, survives geography red-team. STATIC spatial risk ranker, NOT a forecast.
Trust layer artifact built + self-tests (build_trust_index --check, MANIFEST 7/7). PARTIAL: needs human sign-off for external use.
CA bacteria benchmark RELEASE KIT (dataset card/splits/license/leaderboard/MANIFEST 22/22). Staged, publishes nothing. PARTIAL: needs human sign-off to release.
Gate standardization module enforces 4 invariant families; self-test 11/11, CLI exit-gates correctly. Reusable pipeline check.
Honest model cards (bacteria + DA): state where skill is real vs WASHES, incl driver-null, F1 forward + prospective caveat, ECE, small-N.
Tabular bake-off PARTIAL (3-trial probe): HGBT best 0.806 > naive/A2 (+0.107 CI-sep) but does NOT clear Chronos floor 0.827. 40-trial converge pending.

Neural sweep: best TFT 0.8264 TIES Chronos floor 0.8269 (CI straddles 0); beats all trained incumbents (+0.034 vs A3). Training buys NOTHING over zero-shot. Lever to beat floor = feed exogenous covariates.

Foundation fine-tune PARTIAL: smoke ft 0.840 < zero-shot 0.844 (CI strictly negative) -> fine-tuning does NOT beat zero-shot. Full run blocked by GPU admission (E1 held 29.6GB; guard worked). Re-run when GPU frees.
Calibrated quantile heads PASS: ECE 0.19->0.05 (-74%, CI-sep), conformal coverage within tol at 0.80/0.90/0.95. Products get trustworthy probabilities. (DA blocked.)

Rare-event methods REJECT: at precision 0.9, ALL 5 (focal/cost/over/under-sample) are CI-separated REGRESSIONS vs E4 baseline (recall 0.561->0.03-0.53). Focal worse than its own control. Don't use these here.
Stacking: NO deployable gain via honest cal-selection (a real but unselectable test-side gain exists). Ensemble doesn't beat best single after honest selection.
LOXO generalization map: bac LOCO 12/15 CI-sep, LOBO 144/271, LOSO 3/4 (summer +0.113 strong, spring not sep). DA = honest small-N null. Small-N cells flagged.

ADVERSARIAL CRITIC: 5/6 claims SURVIVE refutation (F1, B1-narrow, B5, interlingua-as-downgraded, A4-qualitative). 1 PARTIAL REVERSAL: A4 floor NUMBER 0.827 is a San Diego base-rate artifact (qualitative win stands). ZERO outright reversals, ZERO fabricated metrics.

Skill-budget decomposition: drivers add ~0 beyond persistence+season+station-memory (driver-null confirmed quantitatively); reproduces single-GBT 0.708 + DA 0.188 as validation. Honest negative is the deliverable.

Decision-curve PASS: bacteria forecast net benefit > best naive action over the public-health cost:loss range, bootstrap CI strictly positive. The forecast actually improves the decision (commercial proof).

signal_claims.metric: dominant signal; station_memory baseline AP 0.28 on EXCLUDE_SAN_DIEGO
ΔAP +0.010 (pooled A/B); first-flush mechanism

nbr_lag alone: ΔAP -0.0033 / LOBO +0.0036 = WASH (does not clear the lift bar). The real spatial lifter is the latlon static surface (+0.0355). COMPOSITE GATED 2026-06-19 (claude-escape-B, resolves the revisit_when + the meta-synthesis contradiction): the nbr_and_latlon and discharge+latlon composites have only a MARGINAL synergy (+0.0052 / +0.0056 over best single) that is UNSTABLE — it sign-flips to -0.001 under a 0.002 baseline-snapshot drift (the 06-15 rainfall refresh), and its CSCV-PBO swings 0.086↔0.914 with batch composition. The tier2 'ROBUST' in reports/tier2/tidal/combo_gate.json was contingent on that specific 14-combo batch; reports/tier2/bacteria/combo_gate.json (06-15 snapshot) is stale and is the source of the flagged contradiction. Verdict: NOT a robust interaction escape — stacked main effects (latlon already carries the spatial lift). Evidence reports/tier2/synergy_reconcile_B.json + docs/findings/TIER2_SYNERGY_CONTRADICTION.md.

pooled ΔAP -0.008; noise-band on Monterey (4th driver-null)

vs FULL FEATS+station-memory+rain+discharge (EXCLUDE_SAN_DIEGO, 2022+ test): pooled ΔAP -0.0088 (bootstrap CI [-0.0113,-0.0062], net-negative); leave-one-COUNTY-out mean ΔAP -0.0028, only 7/15 counties positive. Fails the keep rule on every count.
ΔAP sign-flips across strata (+0.044 pooled/SD, -0.010 Monterey) = artifact
not gated for DA; plausible (surge ~ upwelling/storm coupling)

deployable (exclude-SD): temporal ΔAP +0.0106 net vs FEATS+rain, LOBO 59% beaches positive (heavy tail, p10 -0.048/p90 +0.080), perm-null p<0.005. CRITIC-CONFIRMED SURVIVES (2026-06-16); ~half the raw tide lift is a wet-season/rain proxy, +0.0106 is the rain-orthogonal remainder. HARMONIC CONFIRMATION (2026-06-18, vs FEATS+rain+discharge): the deterministic tide-table range (utide, 68 constituents/gauge) alone gives temporal ΔAP +0.0118 (>observed range +0.0095) and leave-one-GAUGE-out +0.0135 (3/3 gauges) — so the escape transfers to UNSEEN gauges and is the astronomical envelope, not surge. LEAKAGE-FREE: train-only (≤2019) refit reproduces 2022+ range at corr 0.99993 and holds ΔAP +0.0124 / LOGO +0.0151. The lunar_phase REJECT (−0.006) was a too-crude synodic-cosine proxy, not absence of mechanism. COVERAGE CORRECTION 2026-06-18 (critic): harmonic range is utide-solved at 3-5 GAUGES and broadcast (≤390 km), NOT computed per-beach — utide needs an observed level series; per-beach needs FES2014/OTPS (blocked). The 5-gauge thinness is NOT dissolved. The +0.009/+0.0118 has no bootstrap CI yet and the perm-null p<0.005 was the observed-range run, not the harmonic feature. SPATIAL-GENERALIZATION OVERTURNED 2026-06-18 (boost-sweep, independently verified): expanding folds 3→14 (27 NOAA harcon stations, median beach→station 76km→11.5km) COLLAPSES leave-one-REGION-out to ΔAP +0.0021 (8/14 positive, per-region −0.024..+0.037) and softens the harmonic perm-null to p=0.09 — neither clears the bar. The strong '3/3 gauges, LOGO +0.0135, perm 0.01' was a NON-REPRESENTATIVE 3-gauge subset artifact. The POOLED temporal lift (+0.009) and the frozen-headline pooled delta (+0.0091 cal AP) still hold and reproduce, but the spring-neap signal does NOT robustly generalize across regions. Honest status: real pooled lift, weak/unproven spatial transfer.

zero-shot US<->IE mean AP 0.136; CORRECTED mean lift 1.91x vs matched-prevalence permutation null (NOT 2.25x vs base; inflation 1.18x). US->IE DURABLE: lift 1.75x, CI[1.61,1.89], p 0.020, beats null max. IE->US MARGINAL: lift 2.08x, CI[1.87,2.32], p 0.039, beaten by 1/50 null perms. Both CI-separated from null p95. Beats E2/E3/E4 + model zoo + identifiable CRL (CRL LOEO lift 2.253 vs pi 2.317 = NULL). Promote to PRIMARY only when IE->US beats null max / p<0.02.

gated 2026-06-15 (claude-escape-A, escape hunt #2) vs FEATS+rain+DISCHARGE deployable stratum: 5 pi-coords joined per station-day (nearest panel site, prev-day, reveal-lagged), coverage train/test ~0.95 clean. temporal ΔAP -0.0025 (and -0.0026 vs the WEAKER FEATS+rain, so NOT a soil-trap, just redundant noise). pi's cross-country transfer skill does NOT translate to operational nowcast lift.

Re-assessed 2026-06-15 (claude-escape-A, escape hunt #2): OUT-OF-SCOPE as a nowcast escape. This is a TARGET-REFRAME (predict the clean->dirty FLIP), not a feature added to the exceedance nowcast; its only separator is rain_prev3d, ALREADY in the FEATS+rain+discharge baseline, so it adds no non-redundant forcing. The prior +0.42 'Oracle AP lift' INJECTED y_true (perfect-knowledge upper bound) and the KEEP was hard-coded with no gated ΔAP/LOBO; critic_laneB.py FLAGged the premise (catastrophic precision at the 7.4% flip base rate). Not a driver-null escape on the nowcast.
ADD-ONE +0.0049 @7d (CI [-0.002,0.011]) / +0.0050 @14d (CI [0.001,0.008], gate edge); DROP-ONE unique CI includes 0 — redundant with thermal cap
ADD-ONE +0.0037 @7d / +0.0031 @14d (below gate, CIs span 0); DROP-ONE unique -0.0038 @14d

DENSITY arm year-ROBUST only @21d (+0.0836 pooled, CI[0.007,0.201]; per-year +0.157/+0.122/+0.111/+0.004 across 2019/20/24/25). @7-14d pooled +0.059 but fragile (negative in 2019-20). THERMAL ~0 all horizons. ~20 renewal episodes.
hypoxia-STATE transfer (mis-framed, base-rate 0.86): PHYS regresses @7-14d, helps only @21-28d via density; NOT a clean transfer. The right Saanich objective is renewal_onset (above).

GATE (vs FEATS+rain AP 0.4614, gate-level truth): soil_sm_top ΔAP +0.0141 (LOBO +0.0139), soil_gwettop +0.0171 (LOBO +0.0085), soil_gwetroot +0.0051 (LOBO +0.0082); perm-null GENUINE (p=0.020, obs +0.0141 > null max +0.0074). OPERATIONAL = do-NOT-ship: vs FEATS+rain+discharge soil regresses EVERY stratum (overall -0.0057, no-gauge -0.0038, gauge -0.0074); redundant with discharge; soil x rain interaction WASH (-0.002). Deployed headline 0.5099 (soil excluded; harmonic tide included). Status KEEP reflects the gate, NOT operational value.
REJECT vs the lean DA+precursor incumbent — soil is a terrestrial runoff driver, not an offshore-upwelling DA driver (mechanism-specific, as expected).
ΔAP +0.0000 vs FEATS+rain
untestable — dust history 2022+ has no train/test overlap with the DA 2018/2020 split (excluded, not washed)
statewide-acres proxy ΔAP -0.0001 vs FEATS+rain (weak proxy; geometry-limited)
not gated — static inventory, no coords/time series; needs geocoding into a per-station density feature

CANNOT feed the daily targets — ran-through-models 2026-06-18: not a configured driver, 0 rows in the test window (>=2022; data ends 2017), annual/seasonal cadence, and wrong mechanism. Untestable like dust_aerosol, not a wash.

corpus staged + normalized (silver static + shadow-carded); CONTAINS A STRONG ABRUPT COLLAPSE TARGET — Pisaster crashes ~3-4x coastwide 2013-2015 (density 0.5->0.10/m^2; counts 2009 peak 22,886 -> 2015 4,863; every georegion). A genuine low-autocorrelation event target (the escape-thesis kind). Next: model the SSWD collapse vs SST/marine-heatwave (Harvell 2019 mechanism) or wire into the kelp/whale ecosystem chain.
different organism + basin; only relevant as a transfer-donor probe, not a CA DA feature.
no Pseudo-nitzschia in the OBIS mirror; community corpus only, low expected transfer value.
ocean-color driver-null expected; not yet gated.
satellite chl proxy; not yet gated for DA.
headline ΔAP -0.0002 (CI95 [-0.0010,0.0004] incl 0) vs full-geo baseline AP 0.9806; redundant with station-memory (AP 0.958)

reports/experiment_program/B5/b5_results.question: Do exogenous drivers lift tail recall / AP on extreme high-consequence exceedances even when they don't on the mean?
reports/experiment_program/B5/b5_results.model_contrast: driver-free (no rain/discharge/air | no nutrients/chl/PN) vs driver-augmented (full A1), same repo HGBT config, isotonic on cal
reports/experiment_program/B5/b5_results.tail_definition: exogenous train-derived p90 severity regimes (wet/dry-onset/station-memory/bloom); recall at fixed precision (0.5, 0.7) + AP on tail
reports/experiment_program/B5/b5_results.gate: recall OR AP gain of driver-aug over driver-free is bootstrap-CI-separated on >=1 driver-relevant tail AND aug beats best-naive there

verdict.interpretation: Drivers earn tail-only skill on the listed strata (CI-separated).
verdict.headline: ESCAPE CONFIRMED ON THE WET TAIL: exogenous drivers (rain/discharge) add CI-separated skill on the storm/wet-season regime (AP +0.060 rain-tail, +0.031 calendar-wet-season; recall@P>=0.7 +0.141), permutation-null clean, beats best-naive. They are NULL/net-negative on the pooled mean and on the dry-onset and station-memory tails. The driver-null law holds on the mean but BREAKS on the high-consequence wet tail.

red_team_robustness.concern_pooled_win_is_cherry_pick: pooled flagged a recall@P>=0.5 +0.0323 CI-sep gain BUT pooled AP gain is -0.0078 (CI -0.013,-0.003) and recall@P>=0.7 is -0.008 (CI-sep negative). Pooled drivers are NET-NEGATIVE -> driver-null law holds on the mean. Pooled is excluded from the wins list; verdict unaffected. Reported straight.
red_team_robustness.concern_selection_on_driver: wet_tail is defined by rain_3d>=p90, which could handicap the rain-blind free model on within-stratum rain gradient. RESOLVED: re-ran on a CALENDAR wet season (Nov-Apr, independent of rain magnitude): aug beats free AP +0.0308 (CI 0.0228,0.0390, frac>0=1.0). The wet-regime driver lift is NOT a selection-on-driver artifact.

driver_block_permutation_null.desc: shuffle the 11 driver cols in TRAIN to break their label link, refit aug, re-score on the real wet_tail; 20 refits.
driver_block_permutation_null.conclusion: real gain exceeds all 20 permutations -> lift is genuine rain/discharge signal, not model capacity from extra columns.

reports/hab/erie/national_microcystin_dr.verdict: driver-null HOLDS nationally (met washes vs history+season)

reports/hab/interlingua_cyano_transfer_d.hypothesis: REFUTATION of the monthly-met NULL: does the physics-pi interlingua manifold transfer to freshwater cyano when pi is built from DAILY (not monthly) met? Monthly smoothing handicapped pi's warm-spell/stratification/antecedent-precip channels; the pre-registered fix is daily resolution.

data.met_source: NASA POWER daily point (keyless; ERA5/Open-Meteo quota-blocked mid-fetch)
data.met_resolution: DAILY met, antecedent windows ending at each weekly obs: long=28d, short=7d (zero future leakage)

reports/hab/interlingua_cyano_transfer_d.held_out_scheme: leave-one-REGION(state)-out; held-out region's lakes NEVER in training; scorable region needs >= 300 rows & 30 events
reports/hab/interlingua_cyano_transfer_d.estimator: standardized class-balanced L2 logistic ONLY (linear; HGBT inflates at this S/N)
reports/hab/interlingua_cyano_transfer_d.verdict: NULL-CONFIRMED (no escape) — daily-met pi-minus-calendar CI95 STRADDLES 0 [-0.0298, 0.0147] with mean pi 0.4155 <= calendar 0.4242; physics does not separate from seasonality on held-out lakes. Daily resolution did NOT flip the monthly null. Daily NARROWED the pi-vs-calendar gap from -0.0338 (monthly) to -0.0087, but did not close it.
reports/hab/interlingua_cyano_transfer_d.decision_rule: pi-minus-calendar CI95 strictly >0 on held-out lakes => SIGNAL-EMERGES (flag for critic). CI95 <=0 / overlapping => NULL-CONFIRMED-STRONGER. <5 regions => UNDERPOWERED.

onset_claim.title: Predicting clean-to-dirty beach surprises
onset_claim.question: Can Monterey Bay AI Lab predict exceedances at currently-clean beaches?
onset_claim.claim: On the currently-clean slice, the calibrated statewide deployable model predicts exceedances with materially higher average precision than station memory.
onset_claim.config: EXCLUDE_SAN_DIEGO; rain+discharge+harmonic-tide+station_geo HGBT, isotonic-calibrated; reveal_lag_days=2; train<=2019, calibrate 2020-21, test>=2022
onset_claim.specialist_verdict: NO ESCAPE: pooled model is already onset-optimal; productize the existing reframe

gate.rule: reproduces headline; onset lift >= +0.15 AP; onset ratio >= 1.7x

caveats: This is a target reframe, not evidence that a separate onset-only model is needed.
The deployed comparator is station memory, not uniform sampling or a naive base rate.
The result is retrospective on the frozen test period; the final breakthrough claim stays blocked until the prospective lockbox is scored.

sampling_pilot.title: Prospective adaptive sampling pilot
sampling_pilot.question: Can model-ranked sampling find more exceedances than site-memory sampling under the same budget?
sampling_pilot.claim: Retrospective replay supports a prospective operations pilot: the mixed-arm adaptive protocol beats station-memory sampling, but the effect is modest and is not yet a standalone science breakthrough.
sampling_pilot.metric: capture@budget = fraction of all exceedances caught when sampling the top-K% by risk
sampling_pilot.headline: At a 20% sampling budget the model catches 71% of exceedances vs 53% for site-memory ranking (+18%, 1.33x SM, 3.53x uniform); CI95 vs SM [0.1381, 0.2149].

gate.rule: full weekly mixed-arm protocol beats station memory with week-bootstrap CI lower bound > 0

arms: model top-risk arm: highest current predicted risk until 70% of weekly slots are filled
sentinel random arm: random eligible sites for at least 20% of slots
continuity arm: fixed long-running sites for up to 10% of slots
pilot_design.primary_endpoint: capture@budget versus station-memory ranking on same sampled opportunities
secondary_endpoints: number of samples needed to detect one exceedance
pilot_design.minimum_duration: 8 weeks or at least 200 sampled site-days, whichever comes later

kill_rules: Stop adding abstractions until one prospective week is run and scored.
Stop or redesign if full protocol lift over station memory is not positive after bootstrap.
Stop or redesign if the random sentinel arm shows systematic missed geography.
Do not claim discovery if gains come only from repeatedly sampling historically dirty sites.

onset_unit_primary.fair_note: persistence DEGENERATE on this slice (exc_prev==0 -> p=0 == base rate); baseline = max(seasonal-naive, station-memory). NEVER use persistence here.

erie_reference.note: single-season Erie 2022 values this national test tries to replicate

C_fraction_with_biomass_IDEAL.reason: public WQP programs do not co-measure mcyE + total-cyano (for the fraction) + chlorophyll (biomass) + microcystin at >=15 site-dates; the genus-specific fraction program carries NO chlorophyll even within +-10 d. The stronger Erie fraction signal (+0.65) stays single-system; needs a program co-measuring all four.

geographic_generalization.note: non-Ohio = New England/Mid-Atlantic/Upper-Midwest/Texas; tests whether the effect is regional (Ohio, ~Erie's region) or genuinely geographically general.

verdict.headline: REPLICATES: mcyE genotype -> microcystin beyond biomass holds across independent lakes AND years (national WQP). The Erie finding generalizes.
verdict.honest_note: Fraction-with-biomass (Erie's +0.65) is NOT cleanly testable nationally: the WQP program carrying total-cyano lacks chlorophyll. mcyE-absolute (Erie +0.21) IS testable with biomass control -- that is test A.

reports/hdc_vsa/hdc_vsa_report.json.value_gate: DO_NOW as shadow validation: reversible benchmark answers whether HDC/VSA adds held-out lift over frozen baselines; no product claim without paired gates.

daily_matrix.gate_note: Research-only. HDC components include all selected matrix columns; target promotion requires target-source-excluded rerun.

reports/bacteria/carte_critic.json._verdict: FAIL (overclaimed). CARTE's win is a BASELINE-WEAKNESS artifact, not a shared-plane/identity win. (a) numeric-only CARTE (strings dropped) AUC 0.759 >= CARTE-full 0.755 -> edge is NOT from station-identity strings, refuting the station-memorization confound. (b) But fair NUMERIC baselines on the same 15 metrics beat CARTE: RandomForest 0.774-0.780 (beats CARTE every seed), logistic 0.742-0.764 (ties), regularized HGBT 0.737-0.756. The pilot's 'raw' = unregularized HGBT(max_iter=400) overfits at n=2000 -> a strawman bar. CARTE clears only the strawman, loses to a vanilla RF on identical features. (c) station overlap test<->train pool = 97.6%; target-encoded identity does NOT close to CARTE (fair-raw CI [-0.021,0.013] incl 0) because at n=2000 per-station counts are too sparse to encode.

reports/tokyo_bay_tbeic/lakehouse_shadow.baseline_policy: Compare each feature family against station-month and persistence-now; mark positives only with station-block bootstrap support.

leakage_report.label_rule: Targets are station-wise future labels created by shift(-horizon); label date is origin_date + horizon.
leakage_report.feature_rule: Feature sets use station/month, Tokyo lag/rolling physical drivers, shadow lag/rolling all-raw aggregates, and l2_openmeteo lag/rolling columns only.

shadow_report.excluded_rule: Use only lag/rolling all-raw shadow columns and l2_openmeteo lag/rolling columns; exclude labels, risks, whale, imputed DA, hazards, and production outputs.

reports/estate_search/FINDINGS.md.text:
# Estate-wide GPU Signal Search — FINDINGS

**Date:** 2026-06-19/20 · **Compute:** RTX 5090 (torch 2.11.0+cu128, CUDA) · **Orchestration:** `estate-gpu-signal-search` workflow (8 agents: recon + 3×build + 3×adversarial-critic + synthesis)

## Mandate
Jon: "run every possible permutation of all signals" / "use the GPU harder" / "all value no bloat" / "we want all the data even if it doesn't find anything, as long as it's real and accurate." Reframe: we had only ever tested **linear subsets of ~20 hand-picked signals**. This searched the **nonlinear functional-form + interaction space over ~1,000+ pooled estate columns**, with valid multiple-testing control, on the GPU.

## Bottom line
**Clean, validly-searched DRIVER-NULL across the entire functional-form + interaction space.** Zero genuinely new signals survive FDR **and** beat the frozen bacteria baseline (calibrated AP **0.5099**, EXCLUDE_SAN_DIEGO). Everything high-scoring is rainfall, station-memory, geography/IDs, or self-referential artifacts. The null — at this scale — **is the deliverable.** Nothing ships; headline unchanged.

## Engines (all RECORD = honest null)

### 1. GPU exhaustive interaction scan (epistasis-style) — `interaction_scan_gpu.py`
- **474,825** pairwise interactions over 975 train-usable estate cols, **4.3M pairs/s**, partial-corr-of-(z_i·z_j)-with-additive-residual statistic.
- Control: BH-FDR (q=0.10) → 828 pass; **300-perm max-stat FWER (p<0.05) → 2 pass**; both gated through a per-row HGBT A/B (interaction-over-main-effects + leave-one-beach-out).
- **0 real survivors.** The one temporally-promising pair (Tokyo Bay surface-salinity × its own lag1, ΔAP +0.0117) is per-station memorization → **LOBO −0.0002**, and is two lags of the same Tokyo variable geographically irrelevant to CA beaches.
- Critic: REAL, leakage-controlled, reproduced; synthetic test recovered a planted interaction (stat 0.957) and rejected a pure main effect (~0.04). **Verdict: RECORD.**

### 2. GPU symbolic regression (auto-discover π-groups) — `symbolic_reg_run.py`
- **3,000,000** expression trees (depth≤3, 12-op set) @ ~7k formulas/s, scored vs the additive FEATS+rain **residual**.
- Best in-sample skill 0.0275 **beats** the permutation null (max 0.0121, p=0.032) → real in-sample structure. But **4 of 5 Pareto formulas just rediscover rainfall** (`nasa_power::PRECTOTCORR`).
- The lone OOT/BH-FDR "survivor" (`ratio(exp(roms::v), sqrt(cdip::airTemp))`): **WASH at signal_lab** (ΔAP +0.0014 < 0.005) **and statistically invalid** — its inputs have 0–1 test-era days, so the feature is a near-constant train-mean fill.
- Critic: REAL GPU run, correct bottom line. **Must-fix (do not cite the "survivor"):** ran over a shared cache matrix with residual FIB leakage; enforce per-column train≥15 ∧ test≥8 day coverage + effective-N guard before Fisher-z; permutation-null framing is anti-conservative not conservative. **Verdict: RECORD.**

### 3. Deep knockoffs (DeepLINK/DeepPINK) — `deep_knockoffs_select.py`
- Competitive-input DNN over original+knockoff features, **knockoff+ FDR** (Candès 2018) q=0.10, 5 seeds, null-symmetric W.
- **0 of 321 candidates** (24 frozen FEATS + 297 estate) survive — τ=∞ all seeds, still 0 at q=0.50.
- **Positive control passes:** `station_prior_rate` ranks #1 by importance (correct rediscovery of the known PRIMARY) — but even it can't clear the finite-sample bound → the null is honest but **partly uninformative/underpowered** at our n/p. Reproduces the lab-memory linear model-X result.
- Critic: REAL, valid FDR (not raw top-k), reproduced. **Must-fix:** wide matrix leaked FIB target-family (`ca_safe_to_swim_fib::geomean_*`) + geo/id/depth columns into the candidate set; null unaffected (a leak only manufactures false positives) but the "leakage-free" wording is overstated; report the statistically-preferred `daily` mode. **Verdict: RECORD.**

## Leakage caveat (does NOT change the nulls)
Two of three wide matrices had incomplete exclude filters — FIB target-family columns (`ca_safe_to_swim_fib::result/geomean_30day/geomean_6week`, `ceden_water_chem::Enterococcus`, `wqp::Enterococcus`, `echo_dmr::Enterococci`) and geo/id/depth/row_number columns reached the candidate set. **A leak can only manufacture a false positive; none occurred, so every null stands.** Must be fixed before any future *positive* from these matrices is trusted.

## What survived nothing tells us
The consistent verdict across interaction-space, formula-space, and knockoff-space: **the lever is not a richer functional form over the existing estate.** It is:
1. **A low-autocorrelation target** — bacteria dry-onset slice, `hypoxia_lead`, cyano onset/anomaly — where the driver-null is known to be escapable (vs the near-ceiling pooled daily bacteria series).
2. **A new modality / objective** — molecular SD ddPCR labels, credentialed FES2014/ERA5/CMEMS physics, or an objective change (triage / transfer / lead-time).

## Next actions
1. **DO NOT promote anything.** Headline stays 0.5099. All three = RECORD.
2. **Catalog:** log the three searched-and-null spaces under `bacteria_exceedance` (done — `estate_interaction_2way`, `estate_symbolic_formula`, `estate_deep_knockoffs`).
3. **Leakage correctness-fix** (before any future positive from these matrices): add `ca_safe_to_swim_fib` + `ca_safe_to_swim_fib_excluded` to the gauntlet `EXCLUDE_PATH_RE`, add `result|geomean|Enterococc|coliform` to `EXCLUDE_COL_RE`, and drop geo/id/depth/pressure/row_number columns.
4. **Scale the valid search** to low-autocorrelation targets — the engines are clean and reusable; point them at the dry-onset / hypoxia / cyano-onset targets.
5. **Data, not form:** prioritize the blocked credentialed fetches (FES2014/ERA5/CMEMS) and molecular labels over more in-estate search.

## Reproduce
```
# interaction scan
python research/estate_search/interaction_scan_matrix.py --max-rows-per-table 120000
python research/estate_search/interaction_scan_gpu.py --target bacteria_exceedance --n-perm 300 --top-ab 8
# symbolic regression
python -m research.estate_search.symbolic_reg_matrix --rebuild
python -m research.estate_search.symbolic_reg_run --n-formulas 3000000 --batch 8000 --n-perm 30 --seed 42
# deep knockoffs
python research/estate_search/deep_knockoffs_wide_matrix.py
python research/estate_search/deep_knockoffs_select.py --q 0.1 --seeds 5 --epochs 150 --mode daily
```
